title: Solving the energy conundrum is key to unlocking the UK’s AI economy
summary: Yet many data center developers lack the resources to navigate these complex contracts or meet the high credit requirements. Ofgem has warned that data center power consumption could significantly exceed Britain’s current peak electricity consumption, risking rising energy costs.
